principles.banner: Lana is built on trust, transparency, and shared responsibility.
principles.title: Lana Participation & Responsibility Principles
principles.subtitle: Welcome to the Lana ecosystem. Lana is built on trust, transparency, and shared responsibility. This document sets out the principles and process that keep the ecosystem fair for everyone.
principles.s1Intro: Lana is more than a transaction system. It is a relationship-based ecosystem where value, trust, and accountability move together. By joining, you agree to uphold:
principles.s2Intro: All activity recorded through Lana must reflect real and truthful exchange. This includes:
principles.s2P4: Truthful reporting of products and services
principles.s2N5: Use of the system for personal gain outside agreed principles
principles.s3Intro: We recognise that mistakes, misunderstandings, and misuse may occur. If an issue is identified, the first step is always:
principles.s3Action: Where needed, participants may be asked to:
principles.s3Responsibility: This is part of Lana's principle of unconditional self-responsibility. Each participant remains free in their choices, and equally responsible for the consequences of those choices.
principles.s4Intro: If a serious issue is identified and responsibility is not yet taken, access to the Lana ecosystem may be temporarily suspended until the matter is resolved. This may include temporary suspension of:
principles.s4P4: Participation within the Lana shop and related services
principles.s4Restore: Access is restored once the matter has been addressed through the responsibility and correction process. Our focus is always restoration before exclusion.
principles.s4Repeated: Repeated or deliberate misuse may lead to permanent removal from the ecosystem.
principles.core: Freedom includes full ownership of consequences. Lana grows through trust. Trust grows through truth.
principles.closing: Thank you for being part of a living economy built on responsibility and mutual respect.

regulars.noProfileFound: No profile found on Nostr relays
regulars.wonderEligible: Eligible for Lana8Wonder — not yet enrolled!
regulars.frozenMessage: This customer's account is frozen because they didn't spend their funds before the split. It can be unfrozen by donating to the common good.
regulars.maxCapMessage: This customer has more than {{lana}} LANA. They need to spend, enroll in Lana8Wonder, or make a purchase before the next split — otherwise their account will be frozen.
regulars.maxCapMessageWonder: This customer has more than {{lana}} LANA. They need to spend or make a purchase before the next split — otherwise their account will be frozen.
regulars.lookupFailed: Failed to look up customer. Please try again.
regulars.walletNotRegistered: This wallet is not registered and does not belong to anyone. The customer must register their wallet first.
